news.headline: New from Composability Labs: Spark, a fast onchain CLOB leveraging Polygon (MATIC) Miden for DeFi efficiency. Click for details!
news.summary: Composability Labs has launched Spark, a cutting-edge central limit order book (CLOB) that makes use of Polygon's (MATIC) Miden state-minimization capabilities. This innovative technology aims to improve efficiency in the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector.

news.headline: EptivA and Infopoly Ltd. collaborate to launch Pain Cloud®, addressing the unmet needs of 1.5 billion chronic pain sufferers globally.
news.summary: In Oxford, England, on July 1, 2024, it was reported that the most recent chronic pain medication was authorized by regulators ten years ago. Despite 1.5 billion individuals globally enduring chronic pain presently, there has been a notable absence of new pain medications. The obstacles encountered in the research and development of pain treatments have made it a pressing issue in the medical field.

news.headline: Robinhood acquired Pluto Capital to enhance AI investment tools; Pluto uses advanced data analysis for personalized strategies.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD) recently revealed its acquisition of Pluto Capital Inc., an AI-powered investment research platform. This strategic decision is intended to enhance Robinhood's offerings by incorporating AI-driven tools and personalized strategies for its customers. Pluto Capital Inc. is recognized for its sophisticated data analysis and tailored investment approaches. Their technology utilizes large language models (LLMs) to analyze and understand real-time personal and global financial data, facilitating prompt recognition of market trends and opportunities. This move showcases Robinhood's commitment to providing innovative solutions in the investment landscape.

news.headline: Snap and Samba TV research shows Snapchat campaigns drive 84% increase in TV show and movie viewership.
news.summary: In San Francisco on July 01, 2024, Snap and Samba TV unveiled research findings demonstrating the efficacy of Snapchat campaigns in driving audiences towards new shows and movies. The study, based on Snapchat's base of over 800 million monthly active users, revealed that campaigns on the platform effectively led to increased viewership post-ad exposure. The comprehensive analysis encompassed various factors such as viewership timings, advertiser types, genres, and seasons. Through a blend of Samba TV's Causal Attribution, Snap's Intent to Treat control, and Samba TV's ACR data, the research accurately gauged the real incremental viewership uplift. The research data displayed an average of 84% rise in viewership for audiences encountering Snapchat ads.

news.headline: Kasada named Strong Performer by Forrester in Bot Management Software report; evaluated among 11 providers based on 24 criteria.
news.summary: In a recent report by Forrester Research, Inc., Kasada, a company known for its innovative approach to combating automated threats by focusing on the humans behind them, was recognized as a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™: Bot Management Software, Q3 2024. The evaluation included 11 significant bot management providers and was based on 24 criteria covering aspects like current offerings, strategies, and market presence. Kasada secured the second-highest score among the providers assessed.

news.headline: Trump Organization secures deal for a new high-rise tower in Jeddah, part of its multiple Middle East projects.
news.summary: The recently announced residential high-rise tower in Jeddah is part of a series of projects planned by the company owned by the former president in the Middle East region. This tower is one of the latest additions to the company's portfolio and reflects its ongoing commitment to expanding its presence in the region. The construction of the tower is expected to cost around \$150 million and will offer luxury living spaces in a prime location in Jeddah. The company's expansion into the Middle East market underscores its strategic growth initiatives and its focus on capitalizing on emerging opportunities in the region's real estate sector.

news.headline: Jenny Carlson named new director by AARP Ohio, with over three decades of experience in government and education.
news.summary: Jenny Carlson, a veteran leader with more than 30 years of experience in federal and state government and education, has been appointed to key positions at the Ohio Department of Aging and The Ohio State University Office of Health Sciences. Based in Columbus, Ohio, Carlson brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to her new roles.

news.headline: Inventor from Delaware creates AIR COMMANDER HUMP to automate adjusting landing gear legs on semi-trailers.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Felton, Del., shared his inspiration for creating the AIR COMMANDER HUMP. As a truck driver, he found manually adjusting dollies and landing gear legs on semi-trailers to be a cumbersome task. Motivated by this experience, he innovated the AIR COMMANDER HUMP to address this issue.

news.headline: BTC mining stocks like MARA, RIOT, and CLSK rise as Bitcoin rebounds. BTC up 2% in 24 hours after 10% dip in a month.
news.summary: Bitcoin mining stocks such as Marathon Digital Holdings Inc (MARA), Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT), and CleanSpark Inc (CLSK) are experiencing an increase in trading on Monday as Bitcoin is recovering from recent lows. Bitcoin has risen by over 2% in the last 24 hours, rebounding slightly after a 10% decline in the past month. This uptrend is contributing to the overall strength in the cryptocurrency market and related stocks. The rise in Bitcoin's value at the beginning of the week may be influenced by spot ETF performance. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Alliance Trust PLC conducts share purchase - undisclosed number of shares bought back.
Global automotive ceramics market valued at $2.8 billion in 2024 projected to reach $5.98 billion by 2034, with 5.92% CAGR growth fueled by lightweight components demand.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Automotive Ceramics Market - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Application, Material, Vehicle Type, and Region - Analysis and Forecast, 2024-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The automotive ceramics market is witnessing substantial growth driven by key factors and market drivers. The market is estimated to be worth $2.80 billion in 2024, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.92% to exceed $X by 2034.

news.headline: Seagram's 7 Crown promotes 'Timeless Taste' with 6 new ads, celebrating iconic 7&7 cocktail. Established in 1970s.
news.summary: Celebrating classic American staples, Seagram's 7 Crown is launching six new advertisements featuring the iconic 7&7 drink. In the 1970s, Seagram's 7 Crown became a timeless favorite across the nation, from dive bars to mainstream popularity. The ads are set to honor this legacy and highlight the drink's enduring appeal.

news.headline: Checkers & Rally's offers free fully loaded fries for a year on National French Fry Day, with free fries offer from July 12-14.
news.summary: Take advantage of a special offer by Checkers & Rally's this National French Fry Day from July 12th to July 14th in Tampa, Florida. Customers who purchase any item can receive complimentary fully loaded fries. Checkers & Rally's, renowned for their delicious and affordable menu options, is inviting fry enthusiasts to enjoy this promotion.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises, Boeing surges on merger deal, Chewy jumps up on Roaring Kitty move. Nvidia falls after Wall Street call.(Characters: 121)
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced gains today amidst a mixed performance in the stock market. Boeing saw a significant rise following a merger agreement, while Chewy's stock value increased due to a move by Roaring Kitty. However, Nvidia faced a decline after receiving a negative assessment from Wall Street. This live coverage highlights the fluctuating market trends, with the Dow Jones up but Nvidia struggling, and Chewy being positively impacted by Roaring Kitty's actions.

news.headline: Vontobel buys minority stake in London infrastructure firm Ancala.
news.summary: In Zurich, Vontobel has successfully acquired a substantial minority share in Ancala, a private infrastructure manager headquartered in London.

news.headline: Invesco closed-end funds raise distribution rates for all investment-grade municipal bond closed-end funds, dividends declared.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the Board of Trustees for various Invesco closed-end funds announced dividends. The ex-date for these dividends is set for July 16, 2024, with both record and reinvest dates falling on the same day. Shareholders can anticipate payment on July 31, 2024. This announcement applies to multiple closed-end management investment companies under Invesco, with details of specific tickers and monthly dividend amounts undisclosed.

news.headline: Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust declare dividends on July 1, 2024. Payable on 7/16/2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the Board of Trustees for Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust announced dividends for each Fund. The dividends are set to be paid on July 16, 2024, to shareholders as of the record date. The reinvestment date is also the same as the payable date.

news.headline: Inventor from Maryland creates ONE STEP CAULKING TAPE for applying caulking compounds to make straight, consistent lines.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Forrest Hill, Md shared his inspiration behind creating the ONE STEP CAULKING TAPE. Seeking to aid in the application of caulking compounds for straight, consistent lines, the inventor developed this rolled tape product. The innovative product aims to eliminate common challenges during caulking, improving efficiency.

news.headline: OKX's campaign grants Latam merchants opportunity for featured ad placements in P2P marketplace. Find out more.
news.summary: A campaign by OKX has been introduced to provide Latin American merchants with an opportunity to secure prominent advertising placements in its P2P marketplace. This initiative allows merchants from the region to vie for featured ad spots through participation. The campaign aims to enhance visibility and potentially boost sales for businesses in Latin America. For more details, please refer to the link provided.

news.headline: Simkus from ECB sees stability in French bonds, no signs of chaos.
Simkus from ECB suggests rate changes not tied to projection meetings, promoting flexibility.
NTT DATA enhances fan experience at The 152nd Open with data insights, transforming engagement for global audience.
news.summary: NTT DATA, a leading global digital business and IT services provider, has revealed its plans to enhance the fan experience at The 152nd Open tournament taking place at Royal Troon from July 14th to 21st. Serving as the official IT partner for this esteemed golf Championship, NTT DATA has a history of elevating fan engagement over the past ten years. In 2021, NTT DATA will introduce groundbreaking technologies aimed at providing fans with immersive experiences, regardless of their location.

news.headline: July interest-rate cut unlikely, according to ECB's Simkus.
Simkus of ECB hints at two potential rate cuts in 2024 if data aligns as projected.
Whistle Express Car Wash acquires Fins Car Wash, adding 15 locations in the Carolinas. Doubles brand presence in key markets.
news.summary: Whistle Express, a prominent player in the car wash industry, has announced a major expansion in the Carolinas through acquiring Fins Car Wash. This strategic move involves rebranding Fins Car Wash's 15 locations under the Whistle Express name. As a result, the brand's footprint in South Carolina's Greenville-Spartanburg and Charleston markets, alongside North Carolina's Triad, Raleigh, and Wilmington regions, will witness more than a two-fold increase. This acquisition will significantly bolster Whistle Express's presence in the region.

news.headline: Global artificial reef market to reach $3023.17 million by 2030 with 7.70% CAGR. Valued at $1936.91 million in 2023.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of July 1, 2024, the Artificial Reef Market is categorized based on types such as Concrete Reef and Resin Reef, and applications including Marine Conservation, Scientific Research, Tourism, and Recreation. The market had a value of USD 1936.91 million in 2023 and is...

news.headline: Samsung Electronics' labor union plans three-day strike.
Over $100M in Bitcoin transferred by US, Germany; will impact market. Speculation on upcoming dump.
news.summary: On Monday, both the German and United States governments transferred Bitcoin totaling more than $100 million. There is speculation about whether they will soon sell off the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Georgia Power partners with US Army Garrison Eisenhower in $72 million contract for energy efficiency and reducing carbon footprint.
news.summary: In Atlanta on July 1, 2024, it was reported that Georgia Power, a subsidiary of Southern Company, has teamed up with U.S. Army Garrison Fort Eisenhower for a project valued at $72 million. This initiative involves a utility energy service contract (UESC) aimed at enhancing energy efficiency at the sprawling 55,000-acre military base situated...

news.headline: DDN AI400X2 Turbo wins 2024 AI Breakthrough Award for accelerating Generative AI and large language model adoption.
news.summary: The DDN AI400X2 Turbo has been recognized in a globally renowned annual awards program for its role in driving the adoption of generative AI and large language models. This acknowledgment comes from CHATSWORTH, Calif., on July 1, 2024. DDN®, a top player in artificial intelligence (AI) and multi-cloud data management solutions, has proven its expertise in this field. This recognition highlights the impact of the DDN AI400X2 Turbo in advancing the use of generative AI and large language models in the industry.

news.headline: L.A. Care and Blue Shield to distribute 18,000 backpacks to students at events. 99,000 backpacks given since 2019.
news.summary: Almost 99,000 complimentary backpacks have been distributed at yearly gatherings following the commencement of a five-year collaboration between health providers in 2019. The partnership involves L.A. Care Health Plan and Blue Shield of California Promise Health Plan Community Resource Centers based in Los Angeles.

news.headline: IDEX Corp to webcast Q2 2024 earnings call on Aug 1, 2024 at 9:30 am CT with CEO Ashleman & CFO Khandelwal.
news.summary: IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX) from Northbrook, Illinois has set the date for broadcasting its second quarter earnings conference call online on Thursday, August 1, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. CT. During the call, Chief Executive Officer and President Eric Ashleman and Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Abhi Khandelwal will review the company's financial performance for the second quarter and address inquiries from the financial sector. Those interested are invited to join the session to gain insights into the company's performance.

news.headline: Verizon's Q2 earnings report to be released on July 22. Analysts eager for rebound in consumer wireless amid previous losses.
news.summary: Verizon is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on July 22. Analysts are closely watching for indications of recovery in Verizon's consumer wireless sector after experiencing a loss in subscribers last year. The question arises whether investors should consider buying or selling Verizon with the upcoming release of the June quarter earnings report.

news.headline: KPN acquires 100 MHz of 3.5 GHz spectrum in Dutch auction for €58.4 million, enabling advancements in 5G technology.
news.summary: In the recent Dutch spectrum auction, KPN successfully acquired a valuable spectrum package consisting of 100 MHz of 3.5 GHz frequency licenses. This acquisition was made at a price of €58.4 million. The licenses obtained by KPN in this auction are valid until 2040. This strategic move equips KPN to advance its 5G capabilities and handle the increasing mobile data requirements expected in the future.

news.headline: LAFC and Pacsun to release second collaborative collection with four pieces including hoodie and T-shirts on July 3, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the Los Angeles Football Club (LAFC) announced a partnership with Pacsun, a California youth lifestyle retailer, to release their second joint apparel line on July 3. The upcoming collection will include four pieces, comprised of a hoodie and three different T-shirts, all designed for unisex wear. This collaboration marks a continued effort from both LAFC and Pacsun to bring unique fashion items to fans and customers, with the new collection aiming to capture the attention of trend-conscious individuals. Stay tuned for the official unveiling of the collection on Wednesday to get your hands on these exclusive pieces.

news.headline: Glass Lewis urges LL Flooring shareholders to vote for F9's 3 nominees, holding 8.85% shares, in the upcoming election.
news.summary: F9 Investments, LLC, along with its affiliates owning about 8.85% of LL Flooring Holdings, Inc. common stock, and being the largest shareholder, revealed that Glass Lewis & Co. has endorsed voting on F9's GOLD proxy card. Glass Lewis, a respected proxy advisory firm, suggested that LL Flooring shareholders vote "FOR" the appointment of F9's three skilled directors.

news.headline: Lightmatter names Simona Jankowski, former NVIDIA executive, as CFO to drive financial functions.
news.summary: Lightmatter, a pioneer in photonic supercomputing based in Mountain View, California, has recently named Simona Jankowski as their new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). With over 20 years of expertise garnered from her tenure at noteworthy companies like NVIDIA and Goldman Sachs, Jankowski is poised to oversee Lightmatter's financial operations, spearhead growth initiatives, and hold a key position within the executive team driving the company's vision to revolutionize the computing landscape. Jankowski's extensive background in leading financial strategies and managing investor relations will be instrumental in guiding Lightmatter towards achieving its goals.

news.headline: Chemed Corp (NYSE: CHE) to release Q2 2024 results on July 24, with conference call on July 25 @ 10 am ET.
news.summary: Chemed Corporation (NYSE: CHE) of Cincinnati disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 on July 24, 2024, post the NYSE trading hours. The subsequent day, on July 25, 2024, at 10 a.m. ET, Chemed will conduct a conference call and webcast to review the quarterly outcomes and offer insight into its operations. Interested parties can tune into a live webcast of the call for further details.

news.headline: K Health, leading AI primary care platform, raises $50M funding led by Claure Group and with participation from investors.
news.summary: K Health, a prominent AI Primary Care platform headquartered in New York, has disclosed securing $50 million in funding. The investment round was spearheaded by Claure Group, alongside notable contributions from Pablo Legorreta, the founder and CEO of Royalty Pharma, as well as existing investors like Mangrove Capital Partners, Valor Equity Partners, and Atreides Management, LP. Highlighting the significance of primary care within the US healthcare sector, which accounts for over a billion visits annually, this funding marks a significant step towards enhancing clinical outcomes and minimizing expenses.

news.headline: Global Chocolate Market worth $132.65B in 2023, projected to grow at 4.48% CAGR, reach $196.79B by 2032 due to rising demand for specialty chocolate and robust food and beverage market.
news.summary: The latest report on the global chocolate market reveals that in 2023, the market was valued at US$132.65 billion. Moving forward, a growth at a CAGR of 4.48% is anticipated from 2024 to 2032, with a projected value of US$196.79 billion by the end of this period. The report includes analysis by type (dark & milk/white), distribution channel (hypermarkets/supermarkets, convenience stores, online retail stores & other channels), countries, and companies. This information has been made available by ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Editor in Chief Terence Samuel of USA Today is resigning from his position.
UPSIDE Foods hosts cultivated meat tasting in Miami before Florida's ban on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: A company recently organized a "Freedom of Food" pop-up event in Miami, FL, where they showcased UPSIDE's cultivated chicken. This event took place before the statewide ban on cultivated meat was implemented on July 1, 2024. The ban officially came into effect on that day in Florida. The event in question occurred in Berkeley, California, before the ban was enforced.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor creates nurse call panel system with audio, video features for impaired users.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Pittsburgh, a new nurse call panel was unveiled with modern enhancements. The panel integrates audio and video communication, catering to the needs of individuals with vision and hearing impairments, as well as those with limited upper limb mobility. This innovation aims to enhance communication in healthcare settings.

news.headline: Anbogen Therapeutics completes A+ round financing with $7.3M to advance ABT-301 Phase II trial.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Anbogen Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage firm focused on pioneering cancer treatments, revealed the completion of a highly successful A+ round financing totaling USD 7.3M. This round follows the prior USD 12.5M funding and was oversubscribed.

news.headline: Austin Powder partners with American Industrial Partners to accelerate growth, receives strategic investment.
news.summary: In Cleveland on July 1, 2024, Austin Powder, a prominent supplier of industrial explosives and engineered blasting solutions, disclosed a new strategic investment from American Industrial Partners ("AIP"). The investment aims to strengthen and improve Austin's operations.

news.headline: AI platform Buildots being used by Juneau Construction at University of Tennessee housing project, increasing efficiency.
news.summary: An announcement was made on July 1, 2024, in Atlanta regarding the integration of the AI construction management platform Buildots into a significant off-campus student housing endeavor at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville. This collaboration involves Juneau Construction Company and Buildots. The project, named Hub Knoxville, marks a notable development in the construction industry as it incorporates advanced technology to navigate through the complexities of the student housing sector. This venture signifies a merging of innovative solutions with real-world construction projects, demonstrating the efficacy of integrating AI into large-scale endeavors.

news.headline: Cantor Fitzgerald and Silverstein Properties partner with Turnbull Development in Summerville, SC Opportunity Zone project.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, affiliates of Cantor Fitzgerald, L.P. and Silverstein Properties announced a collaboration. Cantor Fitzgerald is a prominent global financial services and real assets investment company, while Silverstein is a leading full-service real estate development and investment firm. This partnership signifies a significant move in the financial and real estate sectors. The specific details of the collaboration, including financial figures and investment plans, were not disclosed in the announcement. Both companies are recognized for their expertise and track record in their respective fields, making this collaboration a noteworthy development in the industry.

news.headline: Vivity AI receives praise for tackling inefficiencies in heavy industry worldwide. Expanding to US, Southeast Asia, Middle East.
news.summary: Vivity is experiencing global growth, acquiring clients in the United States, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East, as heavy industry customers operate similarly across various regions. The expansion was announced on July 1, 2024, in SAN ANTONIO. Frost & Sullivan's evaluation of Industrial AI for heavy industries highlighted the company's success in tapping into these diverse markets.

news.headline: IQAir introduces new XE smart air purifiers in North America - HealthPro Compact XE and GCX MultiGas XE.
news.summary: In La Mirada, California, on July 1, 2024, IQAir, a Swiss company specializing in air quality technology, announced the release of their latest air purifiers - the HealthPro Compact XE and GCX MultiGas XE. These advanced models are part of the newly introduced XE line and are currently accessible in North America. This launch signifies the evolution of the company's top-performing air purifiers, offering improved performance and efficiency to consumers in the region.

news.headline: Segmed launches rebrand as Openda, revolutionizing medical imaging data solutions for healthcare innovation.
news.summary: Segmed, Inc., a cutting-edge company based in Palo Alto, California, has recently unveiled an extensive corporate rebranding initiative aimed at advancing healthcare innovation through advanced medical imaging data solutions. The launch took place on July 1, 2024, signaling Segmed's commitment to providing Real-World Imaging Data for Health Innovation. This move signifies Segmed's dedication to revolutionizing the healthcare industry by harnessing the power of state-of-the-art technology and data, promoting cutting-edge solutions for medical imaging.
